column1: # This database contains REAL vulnerability tests for authorized security assessments only
# Unauthorized access or use is strictly prohibited

column9: description
column10: remediation

column9: description
column10: remediation

column9: Batch endpoint without size limits allows resource exhaustion via large payloads.
column10: Implement request size limits and rate limiting.

column9: GraphQL endpoint allows deeply nested batched queries causing CPU exhaustion.
column10: Implement query depth limiting and cost analysis.

column9: Export endpoint triggers expensive DB queries without rate limiting.
column10: Add rate limiting and async export queue.

column9: Unbounded search causes heavy index scanning and CPU spikes.
column10: Implement search timeouts and result limits.

column9: Full-text search without timeout causes database load.
column10: Enforce query timeouts and max results.

column9: SSR endpoint causes CPU spikes on concurrent render requests.
column10: Implement render queue with concurrency limits.

column9: File conversion endpoint consumes excessive memory for large inputs.
column10: Set max input size and conversion timeouts.

column9: Image resizing without dimension limits causes memory exhaustion.
column10: Enforce max dimensions and image size limits.

column9: Unlimited thumbnail generation exhausts disk I/O.
column10: Queue generation tasks and limit concurrency.

column9: Image optimizer runs out of memory for large animated images.
column10: Set max frame count and resolution limits.

column9: Server decompresses user uploads without size limits.
column10: Limit decompressed output size.

column9: Zip bombs crash extractor via exponential decompression.
column10: Detect and block zip bombs before extraction.

column9: Chunked upload reassembly exhausts temporary storage.
column10: Set max total upload size per session.

column9: Many multipart parts cause excessive parsing overhead.
column10: Limit number of multipart parts and size.

column9: Concurrent large uploads fill disk and memory.
column10: Limit concurrent uploads per client.

column9: URL signing endpoint with expensive crypto causes CPU exhaustion.
column10: Cache signed URLs and rate-limit generation.

column9: Expensive encryption operations on large payloads spike CPU.
column10: Limit payload size for encryption endpoints.

column9: Decryption with weak ciphers still causes measurable CPU cost.
column10: Set payload size limits and rate limit.

column9: Expensive hash functions (bcrypt/argon2) exhaust CPU on large inputs.
column10: Use fast hashes for non-security operations.

column9: Signature verification with large keys causes CPU spikes.
column10: Limit input size and use faster key types.

column9: PDF from HTML rendering exhausts memory on complex templates.
column10: Set render timeout and max page count.

column9: Document generation with many embedded images fills disk.
column10: Limit embedded resource count and size.

column9: Spreadsheet generation with many formulas causes slow processing.
column10: Limit formula cell count and formula depth.

column9: Print job submission without limits fills spool queue.
column10: Limit print job size and concurrency.

column9: Complex report generation with many joins crashes database.
column10: Queue reports and limit data aggregation.

column9: MongoDB aggregation pipeline with large result sets exhausts memory.
column10: Set aggregation result limits and timeouts.

column9: Bulk email endpoint without rate limiting exhausts SMTP relays.
column10: Rate-limit outbound emails per sender.

column9: Bulk SMS sending without cost limits causes financial drain.
column10: Set daily SMS caps and spending limits.

column9: Push notification endpoint floods FCM/APNS servers.
column10: Batch pushes and rate-limit per device.

column9: Webhooks that trigger other webhooks create infinite loops.
column10: Detect and break webhook chains.

column9: Callbacks that reflect to same endpoint cause self-DoS.
column10: Implement callback depth tracking.

column9: Event stream connections without limit exhaust server file descriptors.
column10: Limit concurrent SSE connections per IP.

column9: Many event subscribers cause broadcast amplification.
column10: Implement subscriber limits and backpressure.

column9: Unlimited WebSocket connections exhaust ports and memory.
column10: Limit WS connections per IP and total.

column9: Socket.IO upgrade handshakes consume CPU per connection.
column10: Rate-limit socket handshakes per origin.

column9: Unlimited query nesting causes exponential resolve cost.
column10: Enforce max query depth (recommend ≤ 7).

column9: Direct SQL query execution via API without cost limits.
column10: Use parameterized queries with timeouts.

column9: High-volume analytics ingestion can overload write path.
column10: Use buffered async writes with backpressure.

column9: Tracking pixel generates DB write per request under load.
column10: Batch tracking writes asynchronously.

column9: Telemetry ingestion overwhelms time-series database.
column10: Implement ingestion rate limiting and sampling.

column9: Log shipping endpoint with large payloads fills disk.
column10: Limit log payload size per request.

column9: Debug endpoint exposes memory stats and allows heap dumping.
column10: Disable debug endpoints in production.

column9: Health check endpoint triggers full dependency pings.
column10: Cache health status and use lightweight checks.

column9: Readiness probe triggers DB connection pool check on each call.
column10: Use cached readiness status.

column9: Liveness endpoint shouldn't hammer backend services.
column10: Keep liveness checks stateless.

column9: JSON export of entire dataset serializes all records into memory.
column10: Stream export in chunks with max rows.

column9: XML export endpoint accepts malicious DTD references.
column10: Disable DTD processing in XML parser.

column9: CSV import with many rows causes row-by-row inserts.
column10: Batch import in transactions with limits.

column9: XML parser vulnerable to entity expansion DoS.
column10: Disable XML entity expansion in parser config.

column9: Sync endpoint replays all changes causing write amplification.
column10: Use differential sync with change limits.

column9: Backup downloads without auth consume all bandwidth.
column10: Authenticate and rate-limit backup downloads.

column9: Backup restore loads entire dataset hitting disk/memory limits.
column10: Queue restores and validate backup size.

column9: Migration endpoint runs expensive ALTER TABLE operations.
column10: Restrict migration to admin-only with rate limits.

column9: Aggregation pipeline with $unwind on large arrays blows memory.
column10: Set max document size for unwind stages.

column9: Multi-table joins without limits cause temp table explosion.
column10: Enforce join row limits and query timeouts.

column9: DISTINCT on high-cardinality columns scans entire index.
column10: Cache distinct results with TTL.

column9: COUNT queries without WHERE scanning full tables cause I/O spikes.
column10: Use approximate counts from metadata.

column9: Unbounded sort operations spill to disk and exhaust temp space.
column10: Limit sort result set size.

column9: GROUP BY on high-cardinality fields exhausts aggregation memory.
column10: Set max group buckets limit.

column9: Evil regex patterns cause catastrophic backtracking.
column10: Set regex execution timeout and limit pattern length.

column9: Regex validation without timeout freezes worker thread.
column10: Use ReDoS-safe regex engines with timeouts.

column9: Many filter conditions generate exponentially complex queries.
column10: Limit number of filter conditions per request.

column9: Ordering on many columns causes filesort on disk.
column10: Limit sortable columns and result size.

column9: Geospatial queries without radius limits scan large index areas.
column10: Enforce max radius and limit results.

column9: Complex polygon queries cause expensive geometry calculations.
column10: Simplify polygons server-side and set area limits.

column9: Recommendation queries rebuild user affinity matrices on each call.
column10: Cache recommendations and limit neighbor count.

column9: Model inference without GPU exhausts CPU for matrix multiplications.
column10: Batch predictions and rate-limit per user.

column9: Text embedding generation consumes significant CPU/GPU.
column10: Cache embeddings and limit input text length.

column9: Classification models load large vocabularies into memory per call.
column10: Use model serving with autoscaling.

column9: Translation models hold large state causing per-request memory spikes.
column10: Stream translations and limit text length.

column9: Audio transcription consumes CPU for entire audio duration.
column10: Limit audio duration and file size.

column9: TTS generation creates large WAV files filling response buffers.
column10: Limit TTS output length and use streaming.

column9: Object detection on large images uses significant GPU memory.
column10: Downscale images before detection.

column9: Face detection cascade classifier consumes CPU per image.
column10: Limit image resolution and faces count.

column9: OCR on high-res images uses memory proportional to pixel count.
column10: Limit image dimensions for OCR.

column9: AI-powered cropping runs segmentation model per request.
column10: Cache crop coordinates and limit queue depth.

column9: Image segmentation models are memory-intensive per request.
column10: Use request queuing with max concurrency.

column9: GAN inference colorization consumes GPU VRAM per request.
column10: Limit batch size and use model quantization.

column9: Super-resolution models upscale images 4x increasing memory 16x.
column10: Limit output resolution and input size.

column9: VGG-based style transfer uses >1GB GPU memory per run.
column10: Queue style transfer and limit image size.

column9: Stable diffusion inference takes 10-60s of GPU time per image.
column10: Limit inference steps and concurrent requests.

column9: LLM chat without token limits exhausts context window.
column10: Set max tokens and rate-limit per session.

column9: Chat completion endpoint with long history consumes GPU memory.
column10: Limit conversation history length.

column9: Autoregressive generation with max_tokens=4096 uses proportional VRAM.
column10: Enforce per-user max tokens per hour.

column9: Batch embedding of many texts at once exhausts model batch memory.
column10: Limit batch size and input lengths.

column9: Model listing reveals available inference endpoints.
column10: Require auth for model discovery.

column9: Usage endpoint may leak rate-limit thresholds.
column10: Mask rate-limit values in responses.

column9: API documentation exposes internal endpoints and schemas.
column10: Restrict docs to internal networks.

column9: Schema introspection reveals all queries mutations and subscriptions.
column10: Disable introspection in production.

column9: OpenAPI spec exposes full API surface for reconnaissance.
column10: Serve spec only to authenticated users.

column9: Bulk password change requests exhaust auth provider rate limits.
column10: Rate-limit password changes per user.

column9: Password reset endpoint spams email/SMS gateways.
column10: Require CAPTCHA for password reset.

column9: Open registration without rate limiting creates spam accounts.
column10: Use email verification and rate limiting.

column9: Login endpoint without account lockout allows credential stuffing.
column10: Implement account lockout and rate limiting.

column9: OAuth token endpoint without client auth allows token harvesting.
column10: Require client authentication for token grants.

column9: Authorization code endpoint without rate limit exhausts codes.
column10: Rate-limit authorization requests per client.

column9: Bulk 2FA enrollment floods TOTP provisioning.
column10: Rate-limit 2FA setup per user.

column9: 2FA verification without rate limit allows code guessing.
column10: Lockout after 5 failed 2FA attempts.

column9: Session token refresh without limits reissues JWTs infinitely.
column10: Limit refresh token reuse window.

column9: Revoking all sessions triggers DB write storm.
column10: Batch session revocation asynchronously.

column9: Audit log queries without date range scan entire log table.
column10: Require date range and limit results.

column9: Activity feed rebuilds from event store without time bounds.
column10: Paginate and cache activity feeds.

column9: Frequent notification polling causes DB reads per request.
column10: Use WebSocket push instead of polling.

column9: Feed rebuild fan-out queries hit DB on every request for active users.
column10: Cache feeds with TTL and prefetch.

column9: Timeline queries with many followees cause complex join chains.
column10: Limit timeline to recent events with cursors.

column9: User search allows enumeration of registered usernames.
column10: Require minimum search length and rate-limit.

column9: Email search endpoint reveals registered email addresses.
column10: Never expose email in search results.

column9: Fuzzy search with large edit distance causes exponential complexity.
column10: Limit edit distance to ≤2 and query length.

column9: Wildcard prefix scans cause full index traversal.
column10: Ban leading wildcards in search queries.

column9: Autocomplete with short prefixes returns too many suggestions.
column10: Require minimum prefix length of 3 chars.

column9: /metrics endpoint exposes application and system metrics.
column10: Protect metrics endpoint with auth.

column9: Distributed tracing endpoint accepts unsampled traces.
column10: Sample traces and limit ingestion rate.

column9: Profiler endpoint allows CPU heap and goroutine dump.
column10: Disable pprof in production environments.

column9: Heap dump endpoint downloads full JVM/Node memory.
column10: Restrict heap dump to localhost only.

column9: Thread dump reveals running threads locks and stack traces.
column10: Disable thread dump in production.

column9: Env endpoint prints all environment variables including secrets.
column10: Never expose env endpoint in production.

column9: Config endpoint reveals internal settings and feature flags.
column10: Restrict config endpoint to admin.

column9: Route listing endpoint reveals all registered API paths.
column10: Disable route listing in production.

column9: Feature flags reveal upcoming unreleased features.
column10: Rate-limit feature flag polling.

column9: JWKS endpoint serves public keys cached poorly.
column10: Cache JWKS response with proper Cache-Control.

column9: Custom OAuth token endpoint creates DB-backed tokens.
column10: Use opaque tokens with Redis TTL.

column9: Internal health endpoint reveals backend service topology.
column10: Move health checks to separate admin port.

column9: Bulk API processes all items in a single transaction causing lock contention.
column10: Split bulk operations into batches with limits.

column9: Concurrent imports create table lock storms and deadlocks.
column10: Serialize imports per table with queue.

column9: Streaming export without backpressure fills response buffers.
column10: Implement flow control and max rows.

column9: Endpoint with long read timeout holds connections open indefinitely.
column10: Reduce idle timeout and limit concurrent.

column9: Long-poll connections without timeout exhaust worker pool.
column10: Use WebSockets instead of long-poll.

column9: Rapid polling causes handler spawn per request.
column10: Implement minimum polling interval.

column9: Retry logic without backoff causes thundering herd.
column10: Use exponential backoff with jitter.

column9: Rapid queue injection overwhelms worker consumer rate.
column10: Implement queue depth limits.

column9: Mass dequeue operations cause lease contention.
column10: Batch dequeue with visibility timeout.

column9: Fanout to many subscribers causes message amplification.
column10: Limit fanout subscribers per event.

column9: Unbounded pubsub publishing overwhelms all subscribers.
column10: Implement per-topic publish limits.

column9: Rapid subscribe/unsubscribe cycles leak server resources.
column10: Rate-limit subscription changes per session.

column9: Mass unsubscribe triggers DB cleanup storms.
column10: Batch unsubscription processing.

column9: SSE event stream without compression wastes bandwidth.
column10: Enable compression and limit event rate.

column9: Cache purge storms trigger origin re-fetch thundering herd.
column10: Use staggered cache invalidation.

column9: Many cache keys invalidated simultaneously cause DB load spike.
column10: Batch invalidations with delayed refresh.

column9: Full cache clear triggers massive DB read rebuilding.
column10: Stagger cache warming after clear.

column9: CDN purge endpoint accepts unlimited purge requests.
column10: Rate-limit CDN purges per minute.

column9: Bulk CDN invalidations trigger origin load spikes.
column10: Batch invalidations with cooldown.

column9: Prefetching many uncached URLs simultaneously overloads origin.
column10: Limit concurrent prefetches.

column9: Cookie sync endpoints handle overlapping updates poorly.
column10: Use compare-and-swap for cookie updates.

column9: Session sync between data centers causes replication lag.
column10: Use local-first session strategy.

column9: Device registration creates DB records without rate limit.
column10: Rate-limit registrations per IP and account.

column9: Device sync uploads large payloads for every device.
column10: Limit sync payload size and frequency.

column9: Push to many devices amplifies outgoing notification volume.
column10: Batch push tokens and limit per request.

column9: GeoIP database lookups hold read locks under high concurrency.
column10: Cache geo results with TTL.

column9: Reverse geocoding queries external APIs without rate limits.
column10: Cache geocode results and add client limits.

column9: Timezone lookup per IP triggers GeoIP fallback.
column10: Cache timezone by IP prefix.

column9: Rapid currency rate polling hits external exchange APIs.
column10: Cache rates with 5-minute TTL.

column9: Stock price polling without cache hits upstream provider.
column10: Cache prices with short TTL.

column9: Weather API without caching hits upstream provider hard.
column10: Cache weather data aggressively.

column9: Large JWT tokens with many claims cause decode slowdown.
column10: Limit JWT payload size to 8KB.

column9: JWT verification with RS256 causes CPU spikes on verify.
column10: Use faster algorithms like EdDSA where possible.

column9: Concurrent JWT refresh requests create race conditions.
column10: Use refresh token rotation with locking.

column9: Internal proxy endpoint allows targeting internal services.
column10: Restrict proxy to allowlisted destinations.

column9: Server-side URL fetch without timeout hangs worker.
column10: Set fetch timeout and max response size.

column9: Reverse proxy endpoint loops back to origin causing recursion.
column10: Add X-Forwarded-For loop detection.

column9: Open redirect chains create endless browser redirect loops.
column10: Validate redirect targets against allowlist.

column9: Request forwarding between internal services creates circular calls.
column10: Set max forwarding hops limit.

column9: Tunnel endpoint creates persistent connections without limit.
column10: Limit concurrent tunnels per user.

column9: CONNECT-style tunnels exhaust ephemeral port range.
column10: Use connection pooling with limits.

column9: Bind endpoint allocates ports without cleanup.
column10: Implement bind TTL and release on disconnect.

column9: Listen on many ports exhausts OS socket limits.
column10: Limit listen port count per user.

column9: Traffic capture buffers grow without limit filling memory.
column10: Set max capture buffer and duration.

column9: Traffic mirroring duplicates packets causing bandwidth waste.
column10: Rate-limit mirrored traffic per session.

column9: Replaying captured traffic at high speed overwhelms backend.
column10: Limit replay speed multiplier.

column9: Load testing endpoint generates traffic to internal targets.
column10: Restrict load generation to test environments.

column9: Stress test endpoint runs CPU burn loops per request.
column10: Remove or auth-protect stress endpoints.

column9: Benchmark endpoint runs performance tests repeatedly.
column10: Rate-limit benchmarks per API key.

column9: Latency injection endpoint adds artificial delays to services.
column10: Remove latency injection from production.

column9: Fault injection endpoint triggers chaos engineering failures.
column10: Restrict fault injection to staging only.

column9: Chaos endpoint kills services without recovery checks.
column10: Require safety checks before chaos actions.

column9: Adding artificial delays per request builds up queue backlog.
column10: Limit delay injection to debug endpoints.

column9: Throttle configuration endpoint allows lowering rate limits.
column10: Protect throttle config with admin auth.

column9: Rate limit configuration exposes thresholds to attackers.
column10: Never expose rate limit internals.

column9: Frequent circuit breaker resets prevent failure isolation.
column10: Add cooldown after circuit breaker trips.

column9: Changing bulkhead pool sizes disrupts isolation guarantees.
column10: Audit bulkhead config changes.

column9: Reducing retry intervals amplifies retry storms.
column10: Set minimum retry interval floor.

column9: Increasing timeouts allows slow consumers to hold resources.
column10: Enforce maximum timeout ceiling.

column9: Oversized connection pools exhaust database connections.
column10: Limit pool size per service.

column9: Oversized thread pools cause excessive context switching.
column10: Cap thread pool max size.

column9: Increasing DB pool creates too many database connections.
column10: Set hard DB connection pool limit.

column9: Oversized Redis connection pools exhaust redis server connections.
column10: Limit Redis pool per service instance.

column9: Queue depth without limit causes memory exhaustion.
column10: Set bounded queue sizes.

column9: Moving concurrency limit to unlimited causes resource exhaustion.
column10: Enforce absolute maximum concurrency.

column9: Rate limit checks skipped for certain header values.
column10: Validate rate limit for all requests uniformly.

column9: Authenticated users bypass rate limits entirely.
column10: Apply rate limits regardless of auth status.

column9: Adding IPs to whitelist bypasses all security controls.
column10: Require admin approval for whitelist adds.

column9: Toggling maintenance mode causes cascading service outages.
column10: Restrict maintenance mode to admin only.

column9: Rapid feature toggle changes cause config reload storms.
column10: Rate-limit feature toggle changes.

column9: Changing cache strategy purges all cached data.
column10: Stagger cache strategy migrations.

column9: Load balancer config changes cause connection draining storms.
column10: Rate-limit LB config changes.

column9: Rapid scale-up/down cycles cause instance churn.
column10: Add cooldown between scaling events.

column9: Rapid drain/un-drain cycles drop active connections.
column10: Add minimum drain duration.

column9: Rapid shutdown/restart cycles prevent recovery.
column10: Reject shutdown if recovery in progress.

column9: Repeated restarts prevent service from stabilizing.
column10: Rate-limit restart operations.

column9: Rollback chain across versions causes deployment chaos.
column10: Limit rollback version depth.

column9: Concurrent deployments exhaust pipeline capacity.
column10: Serialize deployments per environment.

column9: Concurrent schema migrations cause table lock deadlocks.
column10: Run migrations sequentially with lock timeout.

column9: Creating many indexes simultaneously locks tables.
column10: Rate-limit index creation operations.

column9: Dropping critical indexes causes full table scans.
column10: Prevent dropping indexes with locks.

column9: Adding constraints scans entire tables causing read locks.
column10: Schedule constraint validation during maintenance.

column9: Dropping constraints allows invalid data to enter.
column10: Audit constraint changes.

column9: Resetting sequences causes ID collision risks.
column10: Restrict sequence reset to superuser only.

column9: Truncating tables loses data and causes replication lag.
column10: Require confirmation and backup before truncate.

column9: Dropping production tables causes complete data loss.
column10: Prevent table drops without multi-factor auth.

column9: Switching database mid-query causes connection errors.
column10: Require maintenance window for DB switch.

column9: Premature replica promotion causes split-brain.
column10: Ensure primary is truly dead before promote.

column9: Stopping replication causes data divergence.
column10: Prevent replication stop without failover.

column9: Many snapshots fill disk and cause write pauses.
column10: Limit snapshot retention count.

column9: Restoring snapshots overwrites current data.
column10: Require verification before restore.

column9: Full vacuum locks tables for extended periods.
column10: Use autovacuum with proper tuning.

column9: ANALYZE on all tables creates I/O storm.
column10: Schedule analyze during low traffic.

column9: Reindexing all indexes concurrently locks tables.
column10: Reindex one index at a time.

column9: CLUSTER rewrites entire table locking it exclusively.
column10: Schedule cluster operations during maintenance.

column9: Creating many partitions causes catalog bloat.
column10: Limit partition count per table.

column9: Dropping partitions triggers cascade locks.
column10: Drop partitions in detached mode first.

column9: Attaching partitions requires exclusive lock on parent.
column10: Use non-blocking attach if possible.

column9: Detaching many partitions causes metadata churn.
column10: Detach partitions in batches.

column9: Compacting all tables creates I/O and CPU spikes.
column10: Stagger compaction across tables.

column9: Repacking rewrites tables consuming disk space.
column10: Schedule repack with free space monitoring.
